evidence_quotes.quote: The products that we pay for can be taken from us at any moment without any say in the matter.
They can force the paying customers to hand over their digital product and destroy it.

paragraphs.text: Esteemed members, thank you for this initiative. All the points that you have outlined are of interest and I hope all of them can be accomplished. I believe that the work that you are doing for consumer rights is vital. Especially in these uncertain times where multi national corporations are monopolizing whole sectors and creating a predatory environment for the customers. I truly believe that we have to stand together to demand better of them now, not later. As such I implore you to concider digital products like video games to be part of your mission. The products that we pay for can be taken from us at any moment without any say in the matter. Not owning your digital products only leads to frustration and a worse consumer sentiment and a worse market. I do not want video games or other digital prducts to be gone whenever the corporarions decide that it is convenient for them. They can force the paying customers to hand over their digital product and destroy it. This is a form of planned obselesence that is not good for anyone but the corporations. I hope you will consider games and other digital products as real products and create a future where consumers own what they pay for. Thank you very much and keep up the good fight. The people are watching and your work matters!
